description: Baseline measurement: 17 AI inline assist bindings with custom prompts, 5 agent panel bindings. Starting from this baseline to add more sidekick.nvim-style prompts.

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline before extending AI keybindings

description: Added 8 new sidekick-style inline assist prompts: space a o (optimize), space a C (changes review), space a x (fix diagnostics), space a S (security review) — in both normal+visual and visual-only context blocks. 17 → 25 bindings (+47%). Biome passes, README regenerates cleanly.

asi.hypothesis: Add missing sidekick.nvim prompt types (optimize, changes review, fix diagnostics, security review) to both normal+visual and visual-only context blocks
asi.insight: All 4 new prompt types were added cleanly in both context blocks. The existing keybinding convention (space a + letter) works well. No conflicts with existing bindings.
